Petition To Establish Estates Claim Of Ownership Of Property, For Order Establishing Estates Ownership Of Property
Off Calendar Jul-13-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jane Penhaligen, via Zoom, for Sunday Rosa, Petitioner.

Counsel offers testimony in support of the instant petition. The court queries counsel regarding what efforts have been made to locate the trust. Counsel reports of diligent efforts made to locate the trust including, but not limited to, her own attempt to contact the notary who notarized the trust transfer deed, but she has been unsuccessful in locating him. The court confirms with counsel that the deed is the sole evidence that the trust existed. The court advises counsel that it is not prepared to grant this petition and suggests that counsel consider seeking relief via a trust petition and points counsel to the probate code in the trust area.

After additional discussion, the court confirms its tentative ruling and takes the matter under submission with the intent to deny.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.

Petition To Establish Estates Claim Of Ownership Of Property, For Order Establishing Estates Ownership Of Property

Petition To Establish Estates Claim Of Ownership Of Property, For Order Establishing Estates Ownership Of Property

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-29-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jun-29-2019 is admitted to probate. Sunday P. Rosa is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Dec-05-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
